summary: Tested Social-to-Gallery UX features: Shop CTA on posts, Gallery button on profiles, theme-aware StoryCircle/Note modals, and light mode readability across pages. All features working correctly.

postcard_shop_cta.details: Shop CTA correctly appears on posts from OTHER photographers (Pro Photographer, Test Photographer) with text 'Shop [username]'s Gallery'. CTAs do NOT appear on own posts (davidpritzker's posts). Found 6 Shop CTAs on feed from other photographers.

profile_gallery_button.details: Gallery button with data-testid='view-gallery-button' appears on Photographer profiles (Test Photographer Basic). Button correctly does NOT appear on non-photographer profiles (Grom users like 'david test test test surfer').

messages_story_circle.details: StoryCircle component shows 'Your note' bubble with user avatar and timestamp (16h). Theme-aware colors working - white background with dark text in light mode.

create_note_modal.details: CreateNoteModal opens with title 'Share a note', subtitle 'Shared with followers you follow back', warning 'Notes disappear after 24 hours' in red/orange, input field 'What's on your mind?', emoji picker, Cancel and Share buttons. Theme-aware colors working.

surfer_gallery_page.details: SurferGallery page shows 'My Gallery' with pricing section, session folders with 'Live Session' badges. Theme-aware colors working - white background (rgb(255, 255, 255)) with dark text. Found bg-card and text-muted classes.

explore_page_light_mode.details: Explore page readable in light mode with 'Popular Spots' and 'Trending Posts' sections. Search bar and filter tabs visible with proper contrast.

bookings_page_light_mode.details: Bookings page readable in light mode with 'Sessions & Bookings' header, lineup cards, and 'New Lineup' button visible with proper contrast.

settings_page_light_mode.details: Settings page readable in light mode with account settings and proper text contrast.

social_to_gallery_flow.details: Flow tested: Explore -> Search 'Test Photographer Basic' -> Click profile -> Gallery button visible -> Click Gallery -> Navigates to /gallery?photographer=[id]. Full flow working.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Social-to-Gallery UX features tested and working: Shop CTA on posts from photographers, Gallery button on photographer profiles, theme-aware StoryCircle/Note modals, light mode readability on SurferGallery/Explore/Bookings/Settings pages. User davidpritzker is a Photographer - their posts correctly do NOT show Shop CTA (own posts excluded).
